notes: Six active scope-level scenarios from scopes.md (Scopes 1, 2, 4). Scope 6 was deferred per BUG-015-001 on 2026-04-26; SCN-TW-005 (the original API polling scenario) was relocated to spec.md `Deferred / Non-Goals — API Path` and is intentionally NOT included here. Spec-level scenarios SCN-TW-001 through SCN-TW-006 in spec.md remain locked but are tracked via the lockdownState.lockedScenarioIds field in state.json.

gherkin.when: the parser strips the JS wrapper
gherkin.then: valid JSON array remains and each element is deserialized to ArchiveTweet with ID, FullText, CreatedAt, FavoriteCount, RetweetCount, and Entities populated

gherkin.given: like.js with 200 liked tweets and bookmark.js with 500 bookmarks
gherkin.then: liked tweets and bookmarked tweets are returned as separate collections, each with tweet_id for cross-referencing with tweets.js

gherkin.given: tweets 100, 101, 102, 103 where each replies to the previous and all share the same author
gherkin.then: 1 thread is returned with root_id=100 and 4 tweets in order

gherkin.given: tweet 200 with no parent and tweet 201 replying to 200 but with a different in_reply_to_user_id
gherkin.then: tweet 201 is NOT treated as a thread continuation

gherkin.given: an ArchiveTweet with id=300, FullText=hello world, FavoriteCount=10, hashtags=[go]
gherkin.then: a RawArtifact is returned with SourceID=twitter, SourceRef=300, metadata contains favorite_count=10/hashtags=[go]/processing_tier=metadata, ContentType is tweet/text

gherkin.given: tweets with bookmarked, liked, has-URL, thread, high-engagement, RT, and short-text variants
gherkin.then: bookmarked/liked/has-URL/thread → full, high-engagement non-explicit → standard, retweets → light, short low-engagement → metadata

gherkin.given: a Twitter archive at the configured archive_dir
gherkin.when: Sync() is called with empty cursor
gherkin.then: all tweets, likes, and bookmarks are parsed, threads are reconstructed, all are normalized to RawArtifacts, and artifacts are returned with cursor = latest tweet timestamp

gherkin.given: 3000 tweets were previously imported and a new archive with 3400 tweets is provided
gherkin.then: only 400 new tweets are returned (dedup by tweet_id via cursor)
2 child RawArtifacts are emitted with ContentType=link and metadata edge_type=CONTAINS_LINK + parent_tweet_id

gherkin.given: two tweets that both reference https://example.com/shared
gherkin.then: exactly 1 child RawArtifact is emitted for https://example.com/shared and both parent tweet artifacts are still emitted
